title: Rustins Quick Dry White Satin Paint – Water-Based, Low Odour Paint for Wood & Metal Surfaces – Quick Drying, Hard-Wearing Satin Finish – 250ml, 500ml & 1L
features: Fast Drying Formula: Rustins Quick Dry Satin White Paint dries quickly, allowing for faster project completion without compromising on quality; Ideal for both interior and exterior applications
Smooth Satin Finish: This paint provides a smooth, satin finish that enhances the aesthetic appeal of your surfaces, giving them a sleek and elegant look that is easy to maintain
High Coverage: With excellent coverage, Rustins Quick Dry Satin White Paint ensures fewer coats are needed to achieve a perfect finish. This saves you time and effort. ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: Suitable for use on a variety of surfaces, including wood, metal, and plaster. The paint can be easily applied with a brush, roller, or spray for your convenience
Available in Various Sizes: Rustins Quick Dry Satin White Paint is available in multiple sizes to suit different project needs, from small touch-ups to larger painting jobs
